---
title: "day3_reproducibility_notes"
author: "Kimia Mansouri"
format: html
editor: visual
toc: true
---

## R Environment Setup

I just created a qmd file and saved it into script folder on RStudio and will be pushing it into GitHub.

```{r}
#| eval: false
```

## Conda Environment Setup

### Step 1: Searching for FastQC()

Creating a new environment, installing fastqc and searching for the specific version of Fastqc we like.

```{bash}
#| eval: false
condo deactivate genomics
conda create --name week1 -y
condo activate week1
conda install -c bioconda fastqc=0.11.8 -y

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval : false
library ("tidyverse")
```

## Docker Step 

Allows multiple OS to use the same dependencies as Docker translates between OS's. We pulled the docker first, and then ran the Docker. We then do not need to install anything into our computer.

```{bash}
#| eval: false
docker run --rm -it ezlabgva/busco:v6.0.0_cv1 busco --help
```
